subject: [PATCH pynfs v3 25/26] server41tests: test within-directory rename-over nad_old_entry

2026-06-19.patch_summary: This patch adds a test to the server41tests suite in the Linux NFSv4.1 implementation. The test, called 'testDirDelegRenameOver', verifies that when a within-directory rename operation overwrites an existing entry, the server correctly populates the 'nad_old_entry' field in the NOTIFY4_RENAME_ENTRY notification with the overwritten entry's information. This is in accordance with RFC 8881bis Section 27.4.6. The test creates two files in a delegated directory, renames one file over the other, and then checks that the server sends a correct RENAME notifcation with the old entry's info.
